rejected_items.rationale: Suggestion is technically correct pre-Node 20, but Node 18+ enforces CVE-2024-27980 hardening that REJECTS .cmd/.bat with shell:false (EINVAL on spawn). Verified locally — npm.cmd + shell:false produces EINVAL. Kept original shell:process.platform === 'win32' pattern; added maxBuffer cap and inline rationale for SonarCloud S4036 acknowledgment (PATH search is intentional for npm-style commands; args are hardcoded and untrusted-input-free).

plan.commit_2: MAJOR bugs + CC refactor + regex DoS + doc-lint fix
